name: Smooth Line
description: Your car finds the perfect racing line. Base segment time -5%.

name: Draft Master
description: You exploit every slipstream. Ghost/rival win points +10%.

name: Rain Tires
description: Specialized compound eats up wet roads. Weather time penalties -15%.

name: Lucky Find
description: You always find something useful after a hard run. Gas drop chance +10%.

name: Hairpin Specialist
description: You're made for tight corners. Corner time saves +8%.

name: Momentum
description: At 10+ streak: absorb one crash without gas cost. Resets after use.

name: Fuel Economy
description: Your engine sips fuel. Gas covers 2 consecutive missed days instead of 1.
